description_long: This is a modern two-seater couch upholstered in a deep red fabric, featuring a sleek, angular silhouette with slightly flared armrests. The seat consists of two large, flat cushions, while the backrest is divided into two matching rectangular cushions, both appearing well-padded for comfort. Two decorative throw pillows with a brown geometric pattern are placed at each end, adding a touch of contrast and visual interest. The couch sits on short, sturdy black block legs that are fully exposed, providing a stable base and a contemporary look. The upholstery appears to be a solid color with a subtle woven texture, and the overall construction suggests a wooden frame with foam padding. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living rooms.
description: A modern red two-seater couch with flared armrests, black block legs, and two patterned throw pillows. The design is sleek and contemporary, with plush seat and back cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the couch, both seat and back cushions, and two patterned throw pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the flared armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous red fabric back and the tops of the back cushions with throw pillows barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest shape and cushion depth from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all appearing attached or semi-attached; two loose accent throw pillows placed at each end.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid red fabric with a subtle woven texture; throw pillows feature a brown geometric pattern.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, short black block legs with a simple rectangular profile, providing a sturdy and modern base.
attribute_armrest_design: Flared armrests that angle outward, medium height, fully upholstered in matching red fabric with a smooth, angular contour.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, divided backrest with two rectangular, cushioned sections; appears attached and non-tufted.
